functions.name: SyncBrowserToObjects
functions.description: Browses to the associated asset and selects it in the most recently used Content Browser (summoning one if necessary)

functions.name: SetMetadataTag
functions.description: Set the value associated with a given tag of a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: SaveLoadedAssets
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in. All objects that live in the package will be saved. Will try to checkout the files.

functions.name: SaveLoadedAsset
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in. All objects that live in the package will be saved. Will try to checkout the file.

functions.name: SaveDirectory
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in inside the directory. All objects that are in the directory will be saved.

functions.name: SaveAsset
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in. All objects that live in the package will be saved.

functions.name: RenameLoadedAsset
functions.description: Rename an asset from the Content Browser that is already loaded.

functions.name: RenameDirectory
functions.description: Rename assets from the Content Browser that are in the folder.

functions.name: RenameAsset
functions.description: Rename an asset from the Content Browser. Equivalent to a Move operation.

functions.name: RemoveMetadataTag
functions.description: Remove the given tag from a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: MakeDirectory
functions.description: Create the directory on disk and in the Content Browser.

functions.name: LoadBlueprintClass
functions.description: Load a Blueprint asset from the Content Browser and return its generated class. It will verify if the object is already loaded and only load it if it's necessary.

functions.name: LoadAsset
functions.description: Load an asset from the Content Browser. It will verify if the object is already loaded and only load it if it's necessary.

functions.name: ListAssets
functions.description: Return the list of all the assets found in the DirectoryPath.

functions.name: ListAssetByTagValue
functions.description: Return the list of all the assets that have the pair of Tag/Value.

functions.name: GetTagValues
functions.description: Gets all TagValues (from Asset Registry) associated with an (unloaded) asset as strings value.

functions.name: GetProjectRootAssetDirectory
functions.description: Historically, all project assets were stored in the logical "/Game/" directory

functions.name: GetPathNameForLoadedAsset
functions.description: Return a valid AssetPath for a loaded asset. The asset need to be a valid asset in the Content Browser.

functions.name: GetPackageForObject
functions.description: Returns the object's containing package

functions.name: GetMetadataTagValues
functions.description: Get all tags/values of a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: GetMetadataTag
functions.description: Get the value associated with the given tag of a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: FindPackageReferencersForAsset
functions.description: Find Package Referencers for an asset. Only Soft and Hard dependencies would be looked for.

functions.name: FindAssetData
functions.description: Return the AssetData for the Asset that can then be used with the more complex lib AssetRegistryHelpers.

functions.name: DuplicateLoadedAsset
functions.description: Duplicate an asset from the Content Browser that is already loaded. Will try to checkout the file.

functions.name: DuplicateDirectory
functions.description: Duplicate asset from the Content Browser that are in the folder.

functions.name: DuplicateAsset
functions.description: Duplicate an asset from the Content Browser. Will try to checkout the file. The Asset will be loaded before being duplicated.

functions.name: DoesDirectoryHaveAssets
functions.description: Check if there any asset that exist in the directory.

functions.name: DoesDirectoryExist
functions.description: Check is the directory exist in the Content Browser.

functions.name: DoesAssetExist
functions.description: Check if the asset exists in the Content Browser.

functions.name: DoAssetsExist
functions.description: Check if the assets exist in the Content Browser.

functions.name: DeleteLoadedAssets
functions.description: Delete assets from the Content Browser that are already loaded.

functions.name: DeleteLoadedAsset
functions.description: Delete an asset from the Content Browser that is already loaded.

functions.name: DeleteDirectory
functions.description: Delete the packages inside a directory. If the directory is then empty, delete the directory.

functions.name: DeleteAsset
functions.description: Delete the package the assets live in. All objects that live in the package will be deleted.

functions.name: ConsolidateAssets
functions.description: Consolidates an asset by replacing all references/uses of the provided AssetsToConsolidate with references to AssetToConsolidateTo.

functions.name: CheckoutLoadedAssets
functions.description: Checkout the assets from the Content Browser.

functions.name: CheckoutLoadedAsset
functions.description: Checkout the asset from the Content Browser.

functions.name: CheckoutDirectory
functions.description: Checkout assets from the Content Browser. It will load the assets if needed.

functions.name: CheckoutAsset
functions.description: Checkout the asset from the Content Browser.
